description: Paradigm groupings for website example cards and navigation sections

groups.title: LLM Patterns
groups.description: Core patterns for working with cloud and local language models — chat, streaming, structured output, retries, cost routing, and more.

groups.title: Rule Engines & Decision Tables
groups.description: Deterministic reasoning with CLIPS rules and ZEN decision tables — alone or combined with LLMs for hybrid AI pipelines.

groups.title: Constraint Solvers
groups.description: Z3-based constraint solving for optimization, scheduling, and what-if analysis through the nxusKit solver API.

groups.title: Probabilistic Reasoning
groups.description: Bayesian networks for inference, structure learning, and probabilistic modeling integrated into application workflows.

groups.title: Complete Applications
groups.description: Full applications that combine multiple SDK features into end-to-end workflows — benchmarking, puzzle solving, rule generation, and more.
